provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, middle-aged reptilian alien with olive scales and a careful measured expression, a moderate crest ridge, amber eyes that evaluate everything as a transaction, a relaxed tail, wearing functional dark leather traveling clothes instead of armor with bronze clasps and a practical belt, a reinforced satchel for carrying trade goods slung across the chest, comfortable worn boots shaped for digitigrade feet, a small house badge identifying him for trade credentials but otherwise dressed for travel not combat, even Veshan need merchants
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
